essence: Lays and finishes asphalt and road surfaces that keep transport networks moving safely and smoothly.

identity.title: Road Surfacing Operative
identity.summary: Prepares, lays, and compacts asphalt and other road‑surfacing materials on highways, pavements, and infrastructure projects.

salary.notes: Night‑shift work, major highways projects, and machine‑operator roles can exceed £45k-£55k+.

qualifications: CSCS card and site safety training
Experience with asphalt laying and compaction
Knowledge of road construction methods and materials

lifestyle.description: Road surfacing operatives work on highways, car parks, pavements, and infrastructure projects laying asphalt and other surfacing materials. Days involve preparing the ground, operating rollers and pavers, raking and levelling hot asphalt, and working as part of a coordinated team. The role is physical, outdoors, and often involves early starts or night shifts to minimise traffic disruption. This lifestyle suits individuals who enjoy teamwork, outdoor work, and contributing to essential public infrastructure.

habits: Follows strict safety and traffic‑management procedures
